name: Chano Domínguez
abstract: Chano Domínguez (born Sebastián Domínguez Lozano; 29 March 1960, in Cádiz, Spain) is a Spanish Latin jazz, post bop and flamenco pianist. Dominguez has released over 20 albums as a bandleader, and collaborated extensively with other jazz artists including Paquito D’Rivera, Gonzalo Rubalcaba, Joe Lovano, Chucho Valdés, Martirio, and Wynto…

concerts.label: Paco de Lucía Legacy Festival
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Paquito D'Rivera
about_quotes.evidence: So, every time the music of, uh, Chano Dominguez, for example, which is the Flamenco thing, so what I do I try to learn some phrases, some inflections in order to make the music more convincing, more believable, and to try to pay some respect I am approaching, not imposing my own thing.
about_quotes.doc_title: Paquito D'Rivera — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
